name: Spaghetti with Superb Meat Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the beef roast with salt; dredge it in flour.
2. In a Dutch oven, brown the roast slowly on all sides in hot olive oil.
3. Add hot water and cover; cook slowly for 3 hours or until the meat is almost falling apart.
4. Tear the meat into small pieces using a fork.
5. Add the remaining ingredients (except spaghetti and cheese) to the pot. Cover tightly and simmer for an additional 2 hours, stirring occasionally.
6. Remove the cover and continue cooking until the sauce reaches the desired consistency.
7. Cook the spaghetti according to package instructions; about 1 pound of pasta serves four people.
8. Pour the sauce over the cooked spaghetti and top with grated cheese.
This recipe makes about 3-1/2 quarts of sauce, which is enough for 4 pounds of spaghetti. If you do not need as much spaghetti, consider freezing extra sauce in half-pint, pint, or quart freezer jars for future use. Using a rump roast is preferred, but chuck or round cuts are acceptable alternatives.
